task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL in the format 's3://bucket-name.region.amazonaws.com'
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs in the format 'i-' followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters
